artPrompt: A hooded ashen-robed human cultist looming on a darkened porch, fist raised mid-knock in steep foreshortening toward the viewer's door, gold halo light flaring cold behind the deep cowl. Guttering candles line the path; the doomsday clock tower silhouettes against a blood-dark sky, smoke curling at his ankles. Menacing low-angle composition, sacred dread radiating, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Door-Knocking Cultist
text:
Menace
Whenever Door-Knocking Cultist deals combat damage to a player, that player puts a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock and takes a pamphlet whether they want one or not.
flavorText: Knock knock. Who's there? The end. The end of who? Everyone. Eventually.
